event_world_42_20260423_084335_0000.name: Cherry Blossom Night Market
event_world_42_20260423_084335_0000.description: Celebrate peak bloom with a twilight market under illuminated sakura trees — traditional sake, street food, and live shamisen performances throughout.

reviews.text: Performers were 90 minutes late and the cancellation announcement came via a single tweet.
Great selection of local craft vendors; the live folk music added a lovely ambient backdrop.
Middle-of-the-road experience — worth attending once but not something to travel specifically for.

event_world_42_20260423_084335_0001.name: Electronic Beats Festival
event_world_42_20260423_084335_0001.description: Three stages, twelve DJs, and a laser show that runs all night. Top acts from Berlin's underground scene headline this pulse-pounding electronic showcase.

reviews.text: Too many commercial sponsors with their logos dominating every surface — completely killed the atmosphere.
Spectacular light show and the best sound quality I have ever heard live.
Decent event overall though the merchandise stall ran out of programmes by midday.

event_world_42_20260423_084335_0002.name: Wine & Cheese Masterclass

reviews.text: Terrible organisation — queues stretched around the block and we missed the first act entirely.
Too many commercial sponsors with their logos dominating every surface — completely killed the atmosphere.
Overpriced for what was essentially a community fair dressed up as a premium event.
